data.body: Implemented end-to-end on branch epic/workflow-authoring-v2-foundation (commit fe237e00). All 8 AC met + tested (tests/unit/workflow/test_contracts.py, 11 tests). Layers: schemas (fetch_ticket_input/_output + CONTRACT_SCHEMAS), executor (StepContract/contract_for/register_step kwargs), steps (fetch_ticket annotated), lint_refs (ENGINE_INJECTED_INPUTS + output-field name-existence check, UNKNOWN=skip), editor (step_contract_view/resolve_contracts + REBAR_CONTRACTS + read-only Contract inspector, bundle rebuilt). Fixed 3 latent bad fetch_ticket output refs the new check catches. Full workflow+contracts suites green (260 passed); module-size gate green (lint_refs allow-listed w/ remedy row). Not yet closed pending PR review.
